{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Fisher Soulsmiths
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The hidden weapon used to stab [[Kral]] was believed to be developed by the [[Fisher Soulsmiths]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
